title: LegendSmith
description: A pack that allows item customisation! Adds custom weapons from games like LoZ, FF, XC2, and more! (mainly ssbu lol)
body:
Adds custom textures and models to items when they are renamed. (CIT Resewn / Optifine needed for custom models) Some models and textures are borrowed from [Blades of Majestica](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blades-of-majestica)

# **Remember to follow the project to keep track of updates!**

# **Current weapons** [Weapon Name - User (Name for model change)]
- Master Sword - Link (The Sword that Seals the Darkness)
- Masamune - Sephiroth (Masamune) ([M](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blades-of-majestica))
- Buster Sword - Cloud (Buster Sword)
- Hornet's Needle - Hornet (Needle of Fate)
- Dream Nail - The Knight (Nail of Dreams)
- Pyra's Sword (The Blade of Searing Flame)
- Mythra's Sword (The Blade of Gleaming Light)
- Demon Carver - Master Kohga (Carver of Demons)
- Vicious Sickle - Yiga Footsoldiers (Vicious Sickle)
- Windcleaver - Yiga Swordmasters (Blade of Gales)
- Voidblade - Custom (Blade of Gilded Void)
- Glory Handcannon - Glory's Head from WoF (Magical Death Spit)

# **Note**
- When renaming weapons, as long as the required name (e.g. Buster Sword) is included in the whole name, the change works. (e.g. VoidBuster Sword, My Needle of Fate, Needle of Dreams and stuff)

- HUD changes wil be carried across all available versions while weapon texture changes are along 1.17 - 1.21.1 with CIT Resewn or all versions with Optifine

- I recommend using Better Combat along with this it looks so good

- I also recommend using RP Renames for more efficient renaming

- Resource pack updates would be more delayed now due to busy schedule but will have (hopefully) more content in every release. Sorry for the inconvenience caused.

- Sha1 for servers: bd639bb8916997b235174a9655fe6d3e6eb62629

# **Known Bugs**

- The weapons will have reflections on the water even if ur far away when using shaders. I dont know if this is a shader issue or not, but it should be fine. (Error in Gallery)

# **Upcoming! (Planned for next release)**
- Azurelight (Genshin Impact)
- Staff of Voided Divination (Custom)
- Naginata of Voided Divination (Custom)
- Greataxe of Voided Divination (Custom)
- Custom Animations when holding custom weapons (Maybe it may not work)
- Bedrock Port? (Would be additional weapons instead of renamed weapons)

# **Dependencies**
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

OR

- Optifine

OR

- MCPatcher

OR

- 1.21.5+ Vanilla i think probably wont work but it's worth a shot

# **For NeoForge and Forge users**

**NeoForge:**
- Install [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
- Install [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)
- Install [CITResewnNeoPatcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn-neopatcher)
- Install [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
- You should be able to use this and other CIT packs once these 4 mods has been installed

**Forge:**
- Sorry but u can't use this pack for Forge. You can consider switching to NeoForge, Fabric, or Quilt

# **Communities / Forums**

https://www.reddit.com/r/mcLegendSmithRP/
